CustomField.description: If linked to an AiD, this field pulls in the Department of the User who is the owner of the Deal. Otherwise, this field pulls in the value from Marketing / Trading on related Asset.
CustomField.formula: IF( pro_Asset_in_Deal__c != Null, pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.Owner:User.Department + 'Placeholder Until Departments Set', TEXT(pro_Asset__r.pro_Marketing_Trading__c) )
CustomField.label: Marketing / Trading
